# Beudox HR Management System - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a modern React-based single-page application (SPA) built with TypeScript, using Supabase as the backend-as-a-service platform. The application follows a component-driven architecture with clear separation of concerns.

### Frontend Architecture
- **Framework**: React 18 with modern hooks and concurrent features
- **Build Tool**: Vite for fast development and optimized production builds
- **Routing**: React Router v6 with protected routes and role-based access control
- **State Management**: TanStack Query for server state, React Context for global state
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with shadcn/ui component library
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with Zod validation

### Backend Architecture
- **Database**: PostgreSQL via Supabase
- **Authentication**: Supabase Auth with role-based permissions
- **Real-time**: Supabase real-time subscriptions for live updates
- **Serverless Functions**: Supabase Edge Functions for complex business logic

## Key Design Patterns

### Component Organization
- **Atomic Design**: Components organized by complexity (ui/, layout/, feature-specific/)
- **Composition over Inheritance**: Heavy use of React composition patterns
- **Custom Hooks**: Business logic extracted into reusable hooks
- **Compound Components**: Complex UI patterns using compound component patterns

### Data Flow
- **Server State**: TanStack Query manages all API interactions
- **Optimistic Updates**: Immediate UI feedback with rollback on errors
- **Real-time Sync**: Supabase subscriptions for live data updates
- **Caching Strategy**: Intelligent caching with background refetching

### Security & Access Control
- **Role-Based Access**: Hierarchical permissions (CEO > HR Manager > Team Lead > Employee)
- **Route Protection**: Protected routes with automatic redirects
- **Data Filtering**: Server-side filtering based on user roles and relationships

## Database Schema Highlights

### Core Entities
- **employees**: User profiles with role assignments
- **companies**: Multi-tenant company data
- **departments**: Organizational structure
- **evaluations**: Performance reviews (quarterly and daily)
- **leave_requests**: Time-off management
- **payroll_records**: Salary processing
- **projects**: Project management with team assignments
- **invoices**: Client billing

### Key Relationships
- Employees belong to companies and departments
- Evaluations link employees with reviewers
- Projects have many-to-many relationships with employees
- Leave requests have approval workflows

## Business Logic

### Evaluation System
- **Quarterly Evaluations**: Comprehensive performance reviews with recommendations
- **Daily Evaluations**: Quick feedback with directional ratings
- **Visibility Rules**: Role-based access to evaluation data
- **Timeline Views**: Chronological display of all evaluations

### Payroll Processing
- **Automated Calculations**: Base salary + overtime + bonuses - deductions
- **Multi-currency Support**: PKR-focused with extensible currency handling
- **PDF Generation**: Automated payslip generation
- **Audit Trail**: Complete history of payroll changes

### Leave Management
- **Balance Tracking**: Automatic calculation of leave entitlements
- **Approval Workflows**: Hierarchical approval processes
- **Calendar Integration**: Visual calendar views
- **Policy Enforcement**: Configurable leave policies

## Performance Optimizations

### Frontend
- **Code Splitting**: Route-based code splitting
- **Lazy Loading**: Components loaded on demand
- **Image Optimization**: Responsive images with fallbacks
- **Bundle Analysis**: Optimized chunk splitting

### Database
- **Indexing**: Strategic indexes on frequently queried columns
- **Query Optimization**: Efficient joins and aggregations
- **Real-time**: Selective subscriptions to reduce bandwidth
- **Caching**: Browser and server-side caching strategies

## Development Workflow

### Code Quality
- **TypeScript**: Strict type checking
- **ESLint**: Code linting with React-specific rules
- **Prettier**: Consistent code formatting
- **Husky**: Git hooks for quality gates

### Testing Strategy
- **Unit Tests**: Component and utility function testing
- **Integration Tests**: API interaction testing
- **E2E Tests**: Playwright for critical user journeys
- **Visual Testing**: Screenshot comparisons

### Deployment
- **CI/CD**: Automated testing and deployment
- **Environment Management**: Separate environments for dev/staging/prod
- **Database Migrations**: Version-controlled schema changes
- **Rollback Strategy**: Safe deployment with rollback capabilities

## Integration Points

### External Services
- **Email**: Supabase email for notifications and invites
- **File Storage**: Supabase Storage for documents and images
- **PDF Generation**: Server-side PDF creation for invoices and payslips
- **Calendar**: Integration with external calendar systems

### API Design
- **RESTful Endpoints**: Consistent REST API design
- **GraphQL Alternative**: Supabase provides GraphQL access
- **Webhooks**: Event-driven integrations
- **Rate Limiting**: Built-in rate limiting and abuse protection

## Scalability Considerations

### Horizontal Scaling
- **Stateless Frontend**: Easy horizontal scaling
- **Database Sharding**: Supabase handles database scaling
- **CDN**: Static asset delivery optimization
- **Edge Functions**: Globally distributed serverless functions

### Performance Monitoring
- **Real User Monitoring**: Performance metrics collection
- **Error Tracking**: Comprehensive error logging
- **Database Monitoring**: Query performance and slow query analysis
- **Business Metrics**: KPI tracking and alerting

## Security Measures

### Authentication
- **JWT Tokens**: Secure token-based authentication
- **Session Management**: Automatic session refresh
- **Password Policies**: Strong password requirements
- **MFA Support**: Multi-factor authentication ready

### Authorization
- **Row Level Security**: Database-level access control
- **API Permissions**: Function-level access control
- **Audit Logging**: Complete audit trail of all actions
- **Data Encryption**: Encrypted data at rest and in transit

## Future Enhancements

### Planned Features
- **Mobile App**: React Native companion app
- **Advanced Analytics**: BI dashboard integration
- **API Access**: Third-party integrations
- **Workflow Automation**: Advanced approval workflows
- **AI Features**: Automated insights and recommendations

### Technical Debt
- **Legacy Code**: Gradual migration from older patterns
- **Performance**: Ongoing optimization efforts
- **Testing**: Expanding test coverage
- **Documentation**: Continuous documentation updates
